keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match (New Zealand).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Egypt 0. Finn Surman (New Zealand) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Tim Payne with a cross following a corner.
Mohanad Lasheen (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Sarpreet Singh (New Zealand) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Callum McCowatt (New Zealand) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Hamdi Fathy (Egypt).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Egypt. Ramy Rabia replaces Hamdi Fathy because of an injury.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Egypt 1. Mostafa Zico (Egypt) header from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Mohamed Hany with a cross.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ben Old replaces Callum McCowatt.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Egypt 2. Mohamed Salah (Egypt) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mostafa Zico.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, New Zealand. Jesse Randall replaces Liberato Cacace.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ryan Thomas replaces Sarpreet Singh.
Substitution, Egypt. Trezeguet replaces Omar Marmoush.
Substitution, Egypt. Hamza Abdelkarim replaces Mostafa Zico.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Egypt 3. Trezeguet (Egypt) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mohamed Salah with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Egypt. Zizo replaces Emam Ashour.
Substitution, Egypt. Hossam Abdelmaguid replaces Mohamed Salah.
Substitution, New Zealand. Tyler Bindon replaces Tim Payne.
Substitution, New Zealand. Francis de Vries replaces Elijah Just.
Delay in match because of an injury Hossam Abdelmaguid (Egypt).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Egypt. Mohamed Abdelmonem replaces Hossam Abdelmaguid because of an injury.
